name: Apollo Bay Beach
description: A pristine sandy beach perfect for swimming, picnicking, and building sandcastles with the family.

name: Great Otway National Park
description: Explore stunning rainforest walks, cascading waterfalls, and diverse native wildlife across this protected natural area.

name: Maits Rest Rainforest Walk
description: A short, easy loop walk through ancient cool temperate rainforest with towering mountain ash trees.

name: Cape Otway Lighthouse
description: Climb the historic lighthouse for panoramic coastal views and learn about maritime history in the visitor center.

name: Otway Fly Treetop Walk
description: Glide among the canopy on an elevated walkway and zipline through the rainforest canopy.

name: Split Rock Beach
description: A picturesque sheltered beach with rock pools ideal for young children and rock hopping adventures.

name: Apollo Bay Aquarium
description: View native Australian fish and marine creatures in this small, interactive aquarium experience.

name: Melba Gully State Park
description: Walk through lush fern gullies and spot native birds and wildlife in this scenic rainforest reserve.

name: Town of Lorne
description: A charming coastal village with beaches, shops, cafes, and walking trails along the Great Ocean Road.

name: Lighthouse Beach Playground
description: A family-friendly beach with playground equipment, picnic facilities, and safe swimming areas.
